metadata.note:
Signal requirements cannot be directly determined from the hackers/programs API alone. All listed programs are open + public + offer bounties. The user should verify Signal requirements per program on their HackerOne dashboard or via the program policy endpoint. Programs without Signal requirements accept submissions from any hacker. Programs with low Signal requirements typically require Signal >= 0 or Signal >= -5 and are accessible to new hackers.
Sectors classified for high-value targeting (RCE, SQLi, ATO, IDOR, XSS). Signal requirements must be verified per-program on the HackerOne web dashboard. HackerOne-managed triage (triage_active=True) programs are generally more beginner-friendly. Recommended first targets are listed in 'recommended_first_targets'.

programs.name: Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, NJ, USA
Treasury Board of Canada Secretariat/Secrétariat du Conseil du Trésor du Canada
